series_metadata.series_title: EXAMINATION FILES: Industries regulated by DFI-CF under applicable ORC/OAC laws.
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain examination reports for registrants, licensees, companies, and businesses administered under the Check Cashing Act, Check Cashing Loan Act, Credit Services Organization Act, Insurance Premium Finance Act, Mortgage Broker Act, Pawnbrokers Act, Precious Metals Dealers Act, Mortgage Loan Act, Short Term Loan Act, and Small Loan Act, as indicated in the Ohio Revised Code and Ohio Administrative Code.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronic files during company operation and for five (5) years after company ceases doing business as a registrant or licensee, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain examination reports (including pertinent attachments and work papers) in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years after the company is closed, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
